text: Patient was intubated with a single-lumen endotracheal tube.
Then, 2mm fiber of the bronchoscopy and arterial and bilateral catheter were introduced.
A balloon tip of catheter was placed at left main bronchus.
Total 3 incisions were made.
Camera port was placed at mid-axillary line 8th intercostal space and anterior utility incision and posterior port.
and insufflated 6cm H2O of CO2 gas.
Other incisions are made under thoracoscopic visualization.
Doubling design on the protector was applied at utility incision.
Two instruments through utility incision.
You can see c-semi artery through sequestration.
Dissected c-semi artery with ultrasonic seizures.
Atraumatic forces were used in manipulation of lung parenchyma.
Silk suture were passed the aim in traction.
Ligated c-semi artery with polymer clips.
Then divided system artery with ultrasonic seizures.
Divided inferior pulmonary ligament.
Dissected inferior pulmonary vein.
Right angled clamp then passed behind the pulmonary vein.
Doubly ligated the pulmonary vein with two polymer clips.
Also applied the polymer clip at the digital end of the pulmonary vein.
Then divided the pulmonary vein with ultrasonic scissors.
Attention was moved to fissure and pulmonary arteries.
Dissected lymph nodes and periarticular tissue with ultrasonic scissors.
Careful blunt dissection was also useful.
Dissection of pulmonary artery started from common basal pulmonary artery.
After sufficient dissection, pass wide angled clamp behind the common basal pulmonary artery.
Then ligate the common basal pulmonary artery with polymer clip.
Divided common basal pulmonary artery with ultrasonic seizures.
Then dissected superior segmental pulmonary artery.
Ligation and division of superior pulmonary artery were performed with same manner.
Move attention to peribronchial dissection.
Careful blunt and sharp dissection was performed.
Right angled clamp was passed behind the bronx.
Then endoscopic stapler was applied through the utility incision onto the bronx.
The ballooning of ambulectral catheter was done by anesthesiologist, then by manual bagging confirmed inflation of left upper lobe.
Then, the lower lobe bronchus was transacted.
Introduce endoscopic specimen retrieval pouch and put the transacted lung into the pouch under thoracoscopic visualization.
Then slowly pull the pancreas using the duval clamps.
Pulled saline into the pleural cavity then performed air leakage test.
Applied fibrin glue at the bronchial and vascular stumps.
Inserted a chest tube and closed the wound.
